overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through rural grassland at night. The weather transitions from overcast clouds to a clear starry sky revealing the Milky Way as the character crosses railroad tracks and continues along a dirt path through open wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt trail through grassland under overcast night sky

agents.ego_description: cowboy character walking steadily along a winding dirt path through open grassland with mountains visible in the distance

entered.detail: narrow dirt path winding through tall grass
dark silhouetted mountains against the cloudy sky
clusters of trees dotting the landscape on both sides
tall wooden telegraph pole with crossbars
dark heavy clouds covering the sky, blocking starlight

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail through open grassland at night. The sky is heavily overcast with dark clouds, creating a moody, low-light atmosphere. Distant mountains and scattered trees frame the landscape while a wooden utility pole stands near the path.

events.description: character steps onto railroad tracks, ground surface changes from dirt to gravel
clouds rapidly dissipate revealing a clear star-filled night sky

agents.ego_description: carefully walking across the railroad tracks as the sky clears overhead

entered.detail: metal railroad tracks with wooden ties embedded in gravel
crushed stone ballast surrounding the tracks

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a set of railroad tracks embedded in gravel. As the crossing progresses, the overcast clouds suddenly clear away, dramatically changing the lighting from diffused darkness to a clear starry night. The wooden utility pole and dirt trail are left behind as the character moves onto the gravel bed.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail under Milky Way

events.description: Milky Way galaxy becomes prominently visible stretching across the night sky

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk through the open prairie with the brilliant Milky Way visible overhead

entered.detail: bright band of the Milky Way stretching diagonally across the starry sky

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the tracks, the character resumes walking along the dirt trail through expansive grassland under a spectacular clear night sky. The Milky Way galaxy becomes prominently visible, creating a breathtaking celestial display. The landscape opens up with scattered trees and distant rock formations visible in the starlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural grassland that transforms from a moody, overcast night into a breathtaking celestial display. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt trail under heavy dark clouds, with distant mountains and a wooden utility pole framing the low-light landscape. As the character crosses a set of gravel railroad tracks, the overcast sky suddenly clears, dramatically shifting the lighting from diffused darkness to a crisp, starry night. The scene then expands back onto the dirt trail through open wilderness, where the Milky Way galaxy becomes prominently visible overhead. Finally, the camera continues forward through the expansive grassland, revealing scattered trees and distant rock formations illuminated by the brilliant starlight.
